title: durabaculum validum
intro: Durabaculum validum is a rare and lesser-known plant species, also known as the Stinging Vetch or the Cat's Claw Vetch. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, which can aid in treating skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Durabaculum validum include its potential to improve immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves and stems in hot water to create teas or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
intro_study: According to "Journal of ethnopharmacology", durabaculum validum (also known as Uncaria tomentosa) benefits include the ability to improve repair of DNA single strand breaks and double strand breaks after whole body irradiation.
